elements.title: lang::report_page_041_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT MIN(kbi_ue.id)                                    AS id,
       kbi_u.id                                          AS userid,
       kbi_u.email,
       ((MAX(cmca.cmcnuma) / MAX(cma.cmnuma)) * 100) AS assignments,
       ((MAX(kbi_cmc.cmcnums) / MAX(cmx.cmnumx)) * 100)  AS participations,
       ((MAX(lit.vsts) / MAX(kbi_cm.cmnums)) * 100)      AS visits,
       MAX(cma.cmnuma)                               AS assigns,
       kbi_c.fullname                                    AS course,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       MIN(gc.grade)                                 AS grade
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS vsts, courseid, userid
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking
                  WHERE page = 'module'
                  GROUP BY userid, courseid) lit ON lit.courseid = kbi_c.id AND lit.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, count(id) as cmnums FROM mdl_course_modules WHERE visible = 1 GROUP BY course) as cm
         ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, count(id) as cmnumx
                  FROM mdl_course_modules
                  WHERE visible = 1
                    and completion > 0
                  GROUP BY course) cmx ON cmx.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, count(kbi_cm.id) as cmnuma
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                         JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
                  WHERE kbi_cm.visible = 1
                    and kbi_m.name = 'assign'
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course) cma ON cma.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid, count(kbi_cmc.id) as cmcnums
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm, mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
                  WHERE kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
                    AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
                    AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) cmc ON kbi_cmc.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid, count(kbi_cmc.id) as cmcnuma
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm, mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
                  WHERE kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
                    AND kbi_cm.module = 1
                    AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
                    AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) as cmca ON cmca.course = kbi_c.id AND cmca.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.courseid,
                         kbi_g.userid,
                         ROUND((CASE
                                  WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                  ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade
                  FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi, mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
                  WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
                    AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
                    AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                  GROUP BY kbi_gi.courseid, kbi_g.userid, kbi_g.finalgrade, kbi_g.rawgrademax) as gc
         ON gc.courseid = kbi_c.id AND gc.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_e.courseid = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_c.id
